<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Crear Campaña Manual"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/campaigns/manual"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Crear una nueva campaña ingresando los números manualmente.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["title","message"],"properties":{"title":{"type":"string","description":"Título de la campaña","example":"Campaña de prueba"},"groups":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"integer"},"description":"IDs de los grupos a enviar","example":[1,2]},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Contenido del mensaje","example":"Hola, este es un mensaje de prueba."},"schedule_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Fecha y hora de programación","example":"2025-10-01 10:00:00"},"attach_pdf":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"Archivo PDF adjunto (URL o base64)","example":null}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Éxito","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string","example":"Campaña creada exitosamente"},"data":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","example":1},"title":{"type":"string","example":"Campaña de prueba"},"groups":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"integer"},"example":[1,2]},"message":{"type":"string","example":"Hola, este es un mensaje de prueba."},"schedule_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2025-10-01 10:00:00"},"status":{"type":"string","example":"scheduled"}}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
